title: Baker; vacation of judge of city court
doc_html:
§2488.39.  Baker; vacation of judge of city court

The judge of the City Court of Baker, Louisiana is entitled to an annual vacation of one month with pay at a time to be chosen by the judge.

Added by Acts 1975, No. 715, §1.
